title: Hiring Production Engineer at Marico Advisory Limited

jsonLd.title: Hiring Production Engineer at Marico Advisory Limited
jsonLd.description:
We at Marico Advisory Limited are looking for an experienced Production Engineer based out of Raipur. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Marico Advisory Limited:
Marico Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in ERP Systems

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Life and accident insurance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Raipur, Chhattisgarh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Marico Advisory Limited!
